title: Distant Worlds: Emissive Pack
description: Adds textures with glowing areas to most items, blocks, and entities to the Distant Worlds mod
body:
![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/894115654528036934/1120760188488655018/distant_worlds_emissive_pack_logo.png)

##  • About •

Distant Worlds: Emissive Pack adds emissive elements to most items, blocks, and entities to the [Distant Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/distant-worlds) mod. Beautiful glow effects will allow you to get an even better experience from the gameplay!

> **Items:**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/emN6Eiyp/images/fe2fa58feb2f883be7830208cb48da3478c39ad4.png)

> **Blocks:**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/emN6Eiyp/images/338d80d6ae3da547ecbd679b891d9922553e0abd.png)

> **Mobs:**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/emN6Eiyp/images/cbf7b59fd4716d53abecf9581129d7f3eea78a5d.png)

## • Installation •

Download the file, move it to the resourcepacks folder and activate it in the menu.

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/894115654528036934/1062035862562541598/Untitled451_20230109174942.png)

It also requires OptiFine installed and Emissive Textures enabled in quality settings.

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/894115654528036934/1062035862231208017/Untitled451_20230109174843.png)
